name: Rabaul (Tavurvur)
eruptionHistory: Twin eruptions of Tavurvur and Vulcan in 1994 destroyed much of Rabaul town. The caldera has hosted several major eruptions including a devastating 1937 event.
description: Rabaul caldera contains some of the most active volcanoes in Papua New Guinea. The simultaneous 1994 eruptions of Tavurvur and Vulcan destroyed the town of Rabaul.
